name: Champeach Sorbet
recipeIngredient: 2 cups peach puree (from 6 or 7 medium peaches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make sugar syrup by dissolving the sugar in one cup of water.
2. Heat the mixture over low heat, covered, for five minutes, then allow it to cool.
3. Peel and stone the peaches, then mash or puree the pulp until smooth.
4. Add lemon juice and champagne to the peach puree.
5. Combine the fruit mixture with the cooled sugar syrup.
6. Freeze the mixture in an ice cream freezer or a tray to set.
